entries.value: Drowned Pilgrim
A drowned supplicant whose short fan punishes a fixed firing lane.
Mire Leech
A low mire predator that warns, rushes, and retreats after contact.
Bell Reed
A rooted pressure enemy whose veil ring always leaves a readable gap.
Bell Acolyte
A mobile pressure caster that alternates two offset veil fans.
Chain Sentry
An armored anchor that alternates cardinal and diagonal chain lanes.
Choir Skull
A circling disruptor that turns the room with a two-arm veil rotor.
Sepulcher Knight
A Bell-bound knight who chains charge lanes, stop rings, and shield fans.
Choir Abbot
A stationary conductor whose rotating choir resolves into a final gap ring.
Sepulcher Vestibule
A safe stone threshold before the Bell Sepulcher locks behind you.
Crossing of Four Bells
Four blocked corners divide a cruciform combat floor.
The Sunken Nave
Broken pews frame a central ring and long north-south approach.
Mire Bridge
A narrow dry crossing splits deep water and two hostile lanes.
The Drowned Choir
Four pillars surround the choir's rotating center.
Knight's Processional
Three long charge lanes lead to the Sepulcher Knight's stage.
Ashen Recess
A quiet shrine and stabilization floor between locked encounters.
The Muffled Reliquary
A sealed ring guards a single hidden chest.
Caldus's Bell Court
A circular court marked by four charge endpoints and a western stage.
Bell Sepulcher Vanguard
Six Drowned Pilgrims and two Bell Reeds arrive together after the warning.
Core Bell Sepulcher Route
The fixed six-room private-life route with choir and secret branches disabled.
